page.compatibility.tooltip: Exclusions for specific mods that have unusual spawn rules
page.compatibility.paragraph: Some mods spawn items in unusual ways that can make the grabber overpowered. Use these toggles to automatically exclude known problematic items from those mods.
config.sunberry-village-exclusions.toolt: Prevents the grabber from collecting ore nodes and supply crates that Sunberry Village spawns in a non-standard way. Disable this if you want the grabber to collect those items.
config.visit-mt-vapius-exclusions.toolti: Prevents the grabber from collecting resource nodes (ores, stumps, weeds) from the Visit Mount Vapius mod. These are breakable objects, not forage.
config.baubles-exclusions.tooltip: Prevents the grabber from collecting cattail nodes and petuntse nodes from the Baubles mod. These are breakable resource nodes, not forage.
config.resource-chickens-exclusions.tool: Prevents the grabber from collecting geode stones, fossil stones, egg weeds, egg barrels, and other breakable nodes from the Resource Chickens mod. These are resource nodes that drop special eggs when broken, not forage.
config.cape-stardew-exclusions.tooltip: Prevents the grabber from collecting Kimberlite ore nodes from the Cape Stardew mod. These are mineable ore nodes that drop special diamonds, not forage.
config.automate-compatibility.tooltip: When Automate by Pathoschild is installed, skips machines that are part of an Automate group so both mods can coexist. DGF will only collect from machines that aren't connected to an Automate chest that can accept output. Chests set to 'Never put items in this chest' are treated as input-only and won't prevent DGF from collecting.
section.crop-harvesting.tooltip: These options are only considered if 'Harvest Crops' is enabled
config.harvest-crops-indoor-pots.tooltip: This is ignored if 'Harvest Crops' is disabled
config.harvest-flowers.tooltip: 'Off': never harvest flowers. 'All': harvest all flowers. 'Smart': harvest flowers except those within range of a Bee House, so your honey stays flavored.
config.bee-house-range.tooltip: The tile range used by Smart flower mode to detect Bee Houses near flowers. Vanilla range is 5. Increase this if you use mods that extend Bee House range. Only used when Harvest Flowers is set to Smart.
config.harvest-range.tooltip: This is ignored if 'Harvest Crops' is disabled. Set to -1 to use infinite range. This ONLY affects crop harvesting.
config.harvest-range-mode.tooltip: 'Walk': the distance is the walking distance (in four directions) from the grabber, becoming a diamond shape. 'Square': the distance is a square like a sprinkler. Covers more area than 'Walk'.
config.collect-animal-products.tooltip: Collects eggs, milk, wool, and other animal products from barns and coops. Also picks up dropped items like eggs from the floor.
config.grab-farm-cave-mushrooms.tooltip: This will also work for mushroom boxes placed outside the farm cave
config.collect-buried-items.tooltip: Collects items buried by Farm Type Manager (used by SVE, WAG, and other mods). Without this, those items are consumed and replaced with wrong drops.
config.fell-stumps.tooltip: Chops large stumps and hollow logs in all locations for hardwood.
config.collect-forage.tooltip: Picks up forage items like leeks, daffodils, and spring onions from the ground
config.harvest-green-rain-weeds.tooltip: Breaks apart the large green rain bushes for moss, fiber, and mossy seeds.
config.collect-debris.tooltip: Picks up items dropped as debris on the ground, such as monster loot, fallen items, and other drops that bounce around before settling.
section.machine-collection.tooltip: Automatically collect finished outputs from supported machines
config.collect-machine-outputs.tooltip: Automatically collects finished outputs from supported machines and deposits them into nearby auto-grabbers
config.collect-all-machines.tooltip: Toggles all individual machine options on or off at once. The master 'Collect Machine Outputs' toggle must also be enabled for collection to actually happen
config.collect-crab-pots.tooltip: Also works with Machine Progression System (MPS) upgraded crab pots and Fish Nets (Fishnets mod). Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-bee-houses.tooltip: Also works with Machine Progression System (MPS) upgraded bee houses. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-tappers.tooltip: Collects from both regular and heavy tappers, including Machine Progression System (MPS) upgraded variants. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-leaf-baskets.tooltip: Collects leaves and fiber from Leaf Baskets added by the Cloths and Colors (Textile Expansion) mod. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-mushroom-logs.tooltip: Collects mushrooms from Mushroom Logs, including Machine Progression System (MPS) upgraded variants. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-fish-ponds.tooltip: Collects roe and other produce from Fish Ponds. Grants fishing experience just like collecting by hand. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-kegs.tooltip: Collects wine, juice, beer, and other beverages from Kegs. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-preserves-jars.tooltip: Collects jelly, pickles, and aged roe from Preserves Jars. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-cheese-presses.tooltip: Collects cheese and goat cheese from Cheese Presses. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-mayonnaise-machines.toolt: Collects mayonnaise and duck mayonnaise from Mayonnaise Machines. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-looms.tooltip: Collects cloth from Looms. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-oil-makers.tooltip: Collects truffle oil and oil from Oil Makers. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-furnaces.tooltip: Collects bars and other smelted items from Furnaces and Heavy Furnaces. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-charcoal-kilns.tooltip: Collects coal from Charcoal Kilns. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-recycling-machines.toolti: Collects recycled materials from Recycling Machines. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-seed-makers.tooltip: Collects seeds from Seed Makers. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-bone-mills.tooltip: Collects fertilizer from Bone Mills. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-geode-crushers.tooltip: Collects minerals from Geode Crushers. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-wood-chippers.tooltip: Collects hardwood and other materials from Wood Chippers. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-deconstructors.tooltip: Collects components from Deconstructors. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-fish-smokers.tooltip: Collects smoked fish from Fish Smokers. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-bait-makers.tooltip: Collects targeted bait from Bait Makers. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-dehydrators.tooltip: Collects dried fruit and mushrooms from Dehydrators. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-crystalariums.tooltip: Collects gems and minerals from Crystalariums. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-lightning-rods.tooltip: Collects battery packs from Lightning Rods. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-worm-bins.tooltip: Collects bait from Worm Bins and Deluxe Worm Bins. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-solar-panels.tooltip: Collects battery packs from Solar Panels. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-slime-egg-presses.tooltip: Collects slime eggs from Slime Egg-Presses. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-coffee-makers.tooltip: Collects coffee from Coffee Makers. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-soda-machines.tooltip: Collects cola from Soda Machines. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-statues.tooltip: Collects daily items from the Statue of Perfection, Statue of True Perfection, and Statue of Endless Fortune. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.collect-other-machines.tooltip: Catch-all for any machine not listed above, including machines added by other mods. Collects from any big craftable with a ready output. Ignored if 'Collect Machine Outputs' is disabled
config.report-yield.tooltip: Logs to the SMAPI console the yield of each auto grabber
config.debug-logging.tooltip: Logs detailed trace info to the SMAPI log file for troubleshooting
config.gain-experience.tooltip: Gain appropriate experience as if you foraged or harvested yourself
config.exclude-quest-items.tooltip: Prevents the grabber from picking up items flagged as quest items, like the Lucky Purple Shorts. Recommended to keep enabled unless you know what you're doing.
config.skip-festival-locations.tooltip: Prevents auto-grabbers from collecting items in festival and temporary event locations, including during active festivals
config.grab-frequency.tooltip: 'Instant': items are grabbed the moment they appear (every game tick). Best for completeness, but uses more CPU. 'Hourly': all grabs are batched into the hourly sweep, better for long sessions with many mods. 'Daily': items are only collected at the start and end of each day. Ore panning always runs hourly regardless.
config.excluded-items.tooltip: A comma-separated list of qualified item IDs that the grabber should never collect. For example, '(O)859' to exclude the Lucky Ring. You can find item IDs on the Stardew Valley wiki or with Lookup Anything.
config.global-grabber-mode.tooltip: 'Hover': hover over a grabber and press the fire key to make it collect from all locations. 'All': designate a grabber (open it and tap the star button, or hover + press designate key), then fire it to collect globally.
config.auto-fire-global-grabber.tooltip: When enabled, the designated global grabber automatically collects from all locations at the start of each day. Only used in All mode. Great for mobile users.
config.fire-global-grabber.tooltip: Press to trigger the designated or hovered grabber to collect items from all locations. Only works when Global Grabber Mode is set to All or Hover.
config.designate-global-grabber.tooltip: Hover over an auto-grabber and press this key to designate it as the global grabber. Only used in All mode. On mobile, use the star button in the auto-grabber menu instead.
config.global-button-x-offset.tooltip: Adjust the horizontal position of the Global Grabber star button in the auto-grabber menu. Use this if it overlaps with buttons from other mods.
config.global-button-y-offset.tooltip: Adjust the vertical position of the Global Grabber star button in the auto-grabber menu. Use this if it overlaps with buttons from other mods.
config.rename-button-x-offset.tooltip: Adjust the horizontal position of the Name button in the auto-grabber menu.
config.rename-button-y-offset.tooltip: Adjust the vertical position of the Name button in the auto-grabber menu.
config.skipped-locations-link.tooltip: Choose which game locations to skip when auto-grabbing
config.skipped-locations-paragraph: Toggle locations on or off. Disabled locations will be skipped by all auto-grabbers.
config.enable-all.tooltip: Toggle all locations on or off at once
config.select-visited-only.tooltip: Enables only locations you've visited and skips the rest. If you discover new locations, toggle this again to update.
config.no-save-loaded: Load a save file to see available locations.
hud.designate-first: Designate a global grabber first by opening an auto-grabber and pressing the star button, or by hovering over it and pressing the designate key.
hud.hover-over-grabber: You need to hover your cursor over an auto-grabber to designate it.
hud.no-longer-global: This auto-grabber is no longer the Global Grabber.
hud.now-global: This auto-grabber is now the Global Grabber!
naming.title: Name this auto-grabber
